revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[Template:Kibi clan]]
[[MOS:DRAFTNOLINK]] - that {{ill}} seems to work with draft: is an accident of syntax, not an intended use; also [[Kibi clan]] exists, and unescape lazy copy-paste from url
10 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Kibi_clan]]
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125506241)
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kibi clan | title = [[Kibi clan]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kibitsu Jinja 10 cropped.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto]] * {{ill|Wakatakehiko|ja|稚武彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatakehiko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatakehiko|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Kibitsu Shrine (Bitchū)]] * [[Kibitsu Shrine (Bingo)]] * {{ill|Kibitsu Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|吉備津神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibitsu Shrine (Tokushima)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibitsu Shrine (Tokushima)|qq=}} * [[Kibitsuhiko Shrine]] |group4 = People |list4= * [[Kibi no Makibi]] * [[:en:Eisai|Eisai]]
|group5 = History |list5 = * [[Kingdom of Kibi]] * [[:en:Kibi Province|Kibi Province]] * [[Kibi Clan Rebellion]] * [[:en:Prince Hoshikawa Rebellion|Prince Hoshikawa Rebellion]]
}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
